emails.subject: Mexico advice
emails.body: Mexico advice Per Shari this a.m., we had already requested an update on Ritch, Heather's legal advice from another law firm in Mexico, Lopez Vallardi. You have already authorized payment of the bill. The fax requesting an update from Ritch, Heather went out yesterday. What would you like to do?

emails.subject: Mexico advice
emails.body: Mexico advice Per Shari this a.m., we had already requested an update on Ritch, Heather's legal advice from another law firm in Mexico, Lopez Vallardi. You have already authorized payment of the bill. The fax requesting an update from Ritch, Heather went out yesterday. What would you like to do?

emails.subject: Re: Mexico advice
emails.body: Re: Mexico advice I'm most concerned about the internet aspect of things now this is new advice we are requesting and I would not expect it to be the lion's share of the expense presumably the update portion will be relatively easy. Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 10/26/99 09:45 AM

emails.subject: Re: Mexico advice
emails.body: Re: Mexico advice Shari said our new counsel was supposedly better counsel and that's why we asked for the update from them.
